Three Portals

One Connected EcoSystem.

🗂️

Attorney Portal

Manage cases, collaborate with your team, and track every detail from intake to resolution.

  • Full case lifecycle management
  • Secure document management
  • Task management & deadlines
Explore Attorney Portal
Attorney Portal
🏥

Provider Portal

Coordinate care, manage referrals, and communicate securely across your network.

  • Referral & authorizations
  • Real-time case updates
  • Secure messaging & notifications
Explore Provider Portal
Provider Portal
👤

Patient Portal

Empower patients with transparency and easy access to their case information.

  • View case status & updates
  • Secure document sharing
  • Message your care team
Explore Patient Portal
Patient Portal
